summary: Closed via EXP-365 batch (PATCH-365-D/E) — same primary-DOI replacement as ISS-1947 (the two issues are duplicates against the same ResearchGate citation). Hvožďara & Prigancová 2002 now cites doi:10.1029/2002JA009260 directly. Verification-class patch; no verdict change. See findings_file batch summary_for_decider.
